requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 / Americas Context (Ecuador)
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 / 美洲背景（厄瓜多尔）
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 / 美洲背景（厄瓜多）

summary.en: Ecuador has not mandated a single national EV connector standard as of 2026-06-14. The EV charging market is nascent and fragmented, with multiple connector types in use including SAE J1772 (Type 1, common in the Americas / 60 Hz context for AC Level 2), IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes, gaining adoption from European-aligned charging networks and importers), and for DC fast charging, Combined Charging System Combo 2 (CCS2, IEC 62196-3 configuration FF) as well as CCS1 (SAE J1772 + DC pins, used in North America). Private charging networks and vehicle importers in Ecuador have largely gravitated toward IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) and CCS2 (DC) as de facto standards aligned with European connector practice, but this has not been codified in a binding INEN RTE as of this writing. CHAdeMO is also present in some locations. The GB/T 20234 connector ecosystem used in China is physically and electrically incompatible with any of these connector families and is not deployed in Ecuador's public or private charging infrastructure.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，厄瓜多尔尚未强制规定单一国家电动汽车接口标准。电动汽车充电市场尚处于起步阶段，市场上并存多种接口类型，包括SAE J1772（Type 1，美洲 / 60 Hz环境下交流二级充电的常用接口）、IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes，在欧洲体系充电网络和进口商中逐步推广），以及直流快充方面的联合充电系统Combo 2（CCS2，IEC 62196-3 FF配置）和CCS1（SAE J1772加直流针，北美通用）。厄瓜多尔私营充电网络和汽车进口商大多倾向于采用IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流）作为事实标准，与欧洲接口规范保持一致，但截至目前尚未在具有约束力的INEN RTE中加以明确规定。CHAdeMO在部分地点也有应用。中国使用的GB/T 20234接口生态系统与上述任何接口类型在物理和电气层面均不兼容，未见于厄瓜多尔公共或私营充电基础设施中。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，厄瓜多尚未強制規定單一國家電動汽車接口標準。電動汽車充電市場尚處於起步階段，市場上並存多種接口類型，包括SAE J1772（Type 1，美洲 / 60 Hz環境下交流二級充電的常用接口）、IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes，在歐洲體系充電網絡和進口商中逐步推廣），以及直流快充方面的聯合充電系統Combo 2（CCS2，IEC 62196-3 FF配置）和CCS1（SAE J1772加直流針，北美通用）。厄瓜多私營充電網絡和汽車進口商大多傾向於採用IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流）作為事實標準，與歐洲接口規範保持一致，但截至目前尚未在具有約束力的INEN RTE中加以明確規定。CHAdeMO在部分地點也有應用。中國使用的GB/T 20234接口生態系統與上述任何接口類型在物理和電氣層面均不兼容，未見於厄瓜多公共或私營充電基礎設施中。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories (Type 2 / Mennekes)
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers (CCS2 / Combo 2, configuration FF)
SAE J1772 — SAE Electric Vehicle and Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle Conductive Charge Coupler (Type 1 AC / CCS1 DC, Americas context)
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
INEN — no binding national connector standard confirmed as of 2026-06-14; verify current status with normalizacion.gob.ec

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. The GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler has a visually similar overall form factor to the IEC 62196 Type 2 but differs in connector gender (GB/T uses a male connector at the charger and female vehicle inlet, opposite to the Type 2 convention), signaling protocol (CC/CP versus PP/CP), and contact arrangement, making them physically and electrically incompatible. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers use a nine-pin configuration with CAN bus communication per GB/T 27930, which is geometrically different from CCS2 / CCS1 and uses an entirely different communication stack. No adapter or cable solution makes a GB/T outlet safely interoperable with IEC 62196 or SAE J1772 vehicle inlets.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形与IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但在接口性别（GB/T充电桩端为公口、车辆端为母口，与Type 2惯例相反）、信号协议（CC/CP与PP/CP）及触点排列上均不同，在物理和电气层面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器采用九针配置，通过GB/T 27930 CAN总线通信，与CCS2 / CCS1在几何形状上不同，且使用完全不同的通信栈。任何转接器或线缆方案均无法使GB/T接口与IEC 62196或SAE J1772车辆接口安全互操作。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形與IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但在接口性別（GB/T充電樁端為公口、車輛端為母口，與Type 2慣例相反）、信號協議（CC/CP與PP/CP）及觸點排列上均不同，在物理和電氣層面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器採用九針配置，通過GB/T 27930 CAN總線通訊，與CCS2 / CCS1在幾何形狀上不同，且使用完全不同的通訊棧。任何轉接器或線纜方案均無法使GB/T接口與IEC 62196或SAE J1772車輛接口安全互操作。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Exporters must: (1) confirm the connector type actually required by the specific Ecuador project, site owner, charge-point operator, or vehicle fleet before quoting or sourcing; (2) note that Ecuador has no single mandated national connector standard as of 2026-06-14, and the market includes IEC 62196 Type 2, SAE J1772 (Type 1), CCS2, and CCS1, so the required connector depends on the specific deployment context; (3) treat GB/T connectors as incompatible with all Ecuador-deployed connector families — hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, signaling, and DC communication stack is required; (4) verify with INEN (normalizacion.gob.ec) whether a binding RTE INEN has been issued for EV connector standards since 2026-06-14. Adapters are not an accepted substitute for project-compliant connector design.
gap.zh: 出口商须：(1) 在报价或采购前，确认具体厄瓜多尔项目、场地方、充电点运营商或车队实际要求的接口类型；(2) 注意截至2026年6月14日厄瓜多尔尚无单一强制国家接口标准，市场上并存IEC 62196 Type 2、SAE J1772（Type 1）、CCS2和CCS1，所需接口取决于具体部署场景；(3) 将GB/T接口视为与厄瓜多尔所有部署接口族均不兼容——须对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、信号和直流通信栈进行硬件重新设计；(4) 向INEN（normalizacion.gob.ec）核实截至2026年6月14日后是否已就电动汽车接口标准发布具有约束力的RTE INEN。转接器不是项目合规接口设计的替代方案。
gap.zht: 出口商須：(1) 在報價或採購前，確認具體厄瓜多項目、場地方、充電點運營商或車隊實際要求的接口類型；(2) 注意截至2026年6月14日厄瓜多尚無單一強制國家接口標準，市場上並存IEC 62196 Type 2、SAE J1772（Type 1）、CCS2和CCS1，所需接口取決於具體部署場景；(3) 將GB/T接口視為與厄瓜多所有部署接口族均不兼容——須對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、信號和直流通訊棧進行硬體重新設計；(4) 向INEN（normalizacion.gob.ec）核實截至2026年6月14日後是否已就電動汽車接口標準發布具有約束力的RTE INEN。轉接器不是項目合規接口設計的替代方案。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — no single binding national Ecuador EV connector standard confirmed as of 2026-06-14; connector type determined by project specification, site owner, or charge-point operator; verify current INEN regulatory status before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design; GB/T connectors are physically incompatible with IEC 62196, SAE J1772, CCS2, and CCS1 and cannot be used in Ecuador without hardware redesign

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector redesign is mandatory for any Ecuador deployment — GB/T 20234 connectors are physically incompatible with all IEC 62196 and SAE J1772 vehicle inlets. Ecuador has no single mandated connector standard as of 2026-06-14; confirm the required connector type (IEC 62196 Type 2, SAE J1772, CCS2, or CCS1) with the specific project or operator before committing to hardware.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口重新设计对任何厄瓜多尔部署均属必须——GB/T 20234接口与所有IEC 62196和SAE J1772车辆接口在物理上不兼容。截至2026年6月14日，厄瓜多尔尚无单一强制接口标准；在确定硬件方案前，应向具体项目或运营商确认所需接口类型（IEC 62196 Type 2、SAE J1772、CCS2或CCS1）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口重新設計對任何厄瓜多部署均屬必須——GB/T 20234接口與所有IEC 62196和SAE J1772車輛接口在物理上不兼容。截至2026年6月14日，厄瓜多尚無單一強制接口標準；在確定硬體方案前，應向具體項目或運營商確認所需接口類型（IEC 62196 Type 2、SAE J1772、CCS2或CCS1）。
